target.name: direction_1d
target.description: Direction of the next trading session's close-to-close return.

Majority class.description: Always predicts whichever class was most common during training. The minimum bar any real model must clear.

calibration.interpretation: Predicted probabilities did not beat the base rate out-of-sample. Probability values are withheld; only direction is reported.

Momentum persistence.description: Predicts the last observed return direction will continue. Tests whether a model beats naive trend-following.

calibration.interpretation: Predicted probabilities did not beat the base rate out-of-sample. Probability values are withheld; only direction is reported.

Logistic Regression.description: L2-regularised linear classifier on standardised technical features. Interpretable reference model.

calibration.interpretation: Predicted probabilities did not beat the base rate out-of-sample. Probability values are withheld; only direction is reported.

Random Forest.description: Bagged decision trees capturing non-linear feature interactions.

calibration.interpretation: Predicted probabilities did not beat the base rate out-of-sample. Probability values are withheld; only direction is reported.

LightGBM.description: Gradient-boosted decision trees over technical, market-context and sentiment features.

calibration.interpretation: Predicted probabilities did not beat the base rate out-of-sample. Probability values are withheld; only direction is reported.

target.name: outlook_5d
target.description: Five-session outlook. BULLISH/BEARISH require a move larger than 0.5x the stock's own recent 5-day volatility; otherwise NEUTRAL.
